auto_remediation.action: Switched to direct source refresh using known official/practitioner pages and live URL checks via curl.
auto_remediation.result: Source refresh completed with mixed-source coverage and no fabricated additions.

clustered_themes: Termination route selection is only step one; evidence continuity determines defendability.
Payroll and tax handling can reopen legal risk if settlement wording and payment coding diverge.
City-level implementation differences remain meaningful and need explicit local checks.
Foreign leadership needs a concise risk-signal view, while legal depth should remain appendixed.
source_fit_review.deduplication_note: Removed repeated 'pressure-valve/firebreak' framing from prior run and shifted to a headline signal-stack structure.
key_uncertainties: Local arbitration panels differ in how strictly they evaluate procedural defects.
Settlement tax treatment depends on payment structure and local tax practice.
Late factual changes can make an initially viable termination route unsafe.
